summary: “OpenAI has only two AI accelerator compute vendors in production today, Cerebras and Nvidia,” Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman says. Four days after Cerebras went public, Feldman joined Bloomberg Intelligence’s Kunjan Sobhani to discuss the company’s next chapter and the rapidly shifting AI infrastructure landscape. Feldman breaks down the OpenAI deal, the strategic AWS partnership around disaggregated inference and why Cerebras believes fast inference is becoming the industry’s defining battlegroun

title: Vanguards of Healthcare: Ocular Therapeutix Cuts Blindness Toll
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：眼科疗法减少失明人数
summary: “Forty percent of patients in this country alone in the first year drop out [of current retinal disease treatments] and every one of those patients ends up going blind. By far the most expensive disease in the world is blindness and the reason for that is really quite simple. It’s because the mortality doesn’t change, the use of resources skyrockets, but the mortality doesn’t change. In this country, every blind patient costs over $66,000 a year,” says Pravin Dugel, CEO of Ocular Therapeutix. “I

title: Aluminum Market Tightness Could Continue for 'Long Time,' Morgan Stanley Says
title_cn: 摩根士丹利表示铝市场紧张可能会持续“很长一段时间”
summary: Amy Gower, metals and mining commodities strategist at Morgan Stanley, discusses the impact of the Iran war on aluminum prices. Speaking on Bloomberg Television, she warns the market could "stay quite tight" for a long time. "Most of the smelters that are shut are damaged, and so they're looking at sort of twelve-month restart timelines," Gower explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Petrobras Hikes Gasoline Prices After Brazil Subsidies Approved
title_cn: 巴西补贴获批后，巴西国家石油公司提高汽油价格
summary: Brazil’s oil producer Petrobras is increasing domestic gasoline prices for distributors after the government approved new subsidies to shield consumers from Iran war-fueled crude price hikes.

title: Gold Advances as Report of US-Iran Deal Eases Higher Rates Bets
title_cn: 美伊协议报告缓解加息押注，金价上涨
summary: Gold edged higher after Axios reported that Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.

title: Earnings are Trumping Everything, Says Bob Doll
title_cn: 鲍勃·多尔 (Bob Doll) 表示，盈利胜过一切
summary:
Earnings estimates are surging and the growth of AI spending has served as a counterweight to the hit from Iran.
Bob Doll, CIO at Crossmark Global Investments, joins for a discussion on equity resiliency and warning from the bond vigilantes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks and Bonds Rise After US-Iran Deal Report: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊协议报告后股市和债券上涨：市场结束
summary: Wall Street traders sent stocks toward all-time highs, bonds rose while a rally in oil waned on speculation the US and Iran are close to a diplomatic breakthrough in the war that has rattled global markets.

title: MoneyGram’s Big Crypto Bet
title_cn: MoneyGram 的加密货币大赌注
summary: MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo joins Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about why cash still dominates globally despite the crypto boom. He reveals how MoneyGram’s 500,000 retail locations give it a unique edge and discusses the impact of US immigration crackdowns on remittances. Plus, why the company’s Kraken partnership could reshape crypto spending worldwide. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Reverse Losses on Iran Deal Report as Oil Pares Gains
title_cn: 随着石油价格上涨，美国股市扭转了伊朗协议报告带来的跌幅
summary: Stocks rebounded from earlier losses on Thursday, as investors reacted to a reported deal between the US and Iran.

title: Why Markets Are Ignoring Bad News
title_cn: 为什么市场忽视坏消息
summary: Ardian Co-CEO Mark Benedetti joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why markets keep hitting record highs despite wars, inflation, and rate uncertainty. He breaks down the massive shift that's happening inside private markets, why diversification is making a comeback, and how the booming secondary market could become a $300 billion industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Pares Gain on News of Possible US-Iran Pact to Extend Truce
title_cn: 美伊可能达成延长休战协议的消息推动油价上涨
summary: Oil pared gains on a report that the US and Iran have reached a preliminary agreement to extend the ceasefire between the two countries and launch negotiations on the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program.

title: Citadel Securities Sees Markets Underpricing Signs of Iran Deal
title_cn: Citadel 证券认为市场低估了伊朗协议的迹象
summary: Investors may be underestimating the chances of a “timely” reopening of the Strait of Hormuz triggering a broad relief rally across financial markets, according to Citadel Securities.

title: Copasa Relaunches Share Offering After Bids Came Below Minimum
title_cn: 出价低于最低价后 Copasa 重新启动股票发行
summary: Cia de Saneamento de Minas Gerais announced new terms for its privatization process, after two bids for a 30% stake in the Brazilian water utility came in below the government’s expectations.

title: Dollar Falls Against Major Peers on Report of US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 美伊协议报道导致美元兑主要货币下跌
summary: The dollar fell against all of its major peers after a report that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a ceasefire, pending the approval of President Donald Trump.

title: Argentine Provinces Tap Global Markets That Sovereign Avoids
title_cn: 阿根廷各省开拓主权回避的全球市场
summary: Argentine provinces are tapping global bond markets at the fastest pace in nearly a decade, even as the federal government sticks to short-term debt in the local market amid investor fears over the 2027 elections.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Extend Truce, Axios Reports
title_cn: Axios 报道，美国和伊朗达成延长休战协议
summary: Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war, Axios reported, sending oil prices lower. Tyler Kendall reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasuries Rise After Reported US-Iran Deal to Extend Truce
title_cn: 据报道美国与伊朗达成延长休战协议后国债上涨
summary: Treasuries rose after a report that the US and Iran reached an agreement to extend a truce and work toward an end to a three-month war that’s ignited an oil-driven surge in inflation.

title: Avis’ Shock Split With Vendor Revives Credit’s Big Software Fear
title_cn: 安飞士与供应商的震惊分裂重燃了信贷对大型软件的恐惧
summary: It in many ways embodies investors’ worst fears of how a SaaSpocalypse might play out.

title: Odd Lots Is Coming to Hong Kong
title_cn: 零星货即将登陆香港
summary: Come test your wits.

title: China Sells $885 Million of Green Bonds in Hong Kong Debut
title_cn: 中国在香港首次发行8.85亿美元绿色债券
summary: China priced 6 billion yuan ($885 million) of green sovereign bonds on Thursday, a year after the government’s debut in the international ESG debt market.

title: Drone Stocks Soar on News of Trump Team Eyeing Funding Deals
title_cn: 特朗普团队考虑融资交易的消息推动无人机股价飙升
summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump Administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.

title: Drone Makers Quantum and Destinus Seek Banks for 2027 IPOs
title_cn: 无人机制造商 Quantum 和 Destinus 寻求银行进行 2027 年 IPO
summary: Quantum Systems and Destinus are in talks to line up advisers for potential IPOs as soon as early 2027, people familiar with the matter said, as the drone makers seek to tap surging demand for unmanned defense assets.

title: Goldman's Snider Sees Earnings Driving Stocks Higher
title_cn: 高盛的斯奈德认为盈利将推动股市走高
summary: Goldman Sachs Chief US Equity Strategist Ben Snider discusses the recent increase in the firm's S&P 500 price target, highlighting strong earnings growth as the primary driver behind the adjustment. Speaking with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Snider also says he expects AI gains to broaden out in the market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU’s Economic Powers Seek Unity to Push Capital Markets Merger
title_cn: 欧盟经济大国寻求团结推动资本市场合并
summary: The European Union’s six largest economies are advancing plans for a bloc-wide capital markets union, hoping their collective voice will spur the continent to action after years of delay.

title: Bitcoin Falls Below $73,000 Despite Trump’s Crypto Capital Push
title_cn: 尽管特朗普大力推动加密货币资本，但比特币仍跌破 73,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin briefly fell below $73,000 despite a fresh push from Donald Trump for the CLARITY Act, suggesting pro-crypto messaging from  Washington is losing its ability to drive gains in digital assets.

title: Fed’s Williams Says Monetary Policy Well-Positioned Right Now
title_cn: 美联储威廉姆斯表示货币政策目前处于有利位置
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of New York President John Williams said the central bank’s policy is well-positioned to respond to the economic effects of the US war in Iran.

title: German Power Prices Swing From Zero to Almost €400 in a Day
title_cn: 德国电价一天内从零升至近 400 欧元
summary: German power prices will swing sharply on Thursday, with electricity trading close to zero at noon before surging to nearly €400 ($465) a megawatt-hour in the evening as solar generation fades.

title: Fed's Jefferson Warns Inflation Risks Are Tilted to the Upside
title_cn: 美联储杰斐逊警告通胀风险偏上行
summary: Federal Reserve Vice Chair Philip Jefferson says he expects inflation to cool later this year as the effects of tariffs and higher energy costs wear off but cautions that inflationary risks remain tilted to the upside. He speaks at a conference hosted by the Bank of Japan in Tokyo. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Russia Selling Yuan Bonds After Putin’s Visit to Beijing
title_cn: 普京访华后俄罗斯出售人民币债券
summary: Russia is selling its second issue of yuan-denominated sovereign bonds after President Vladimir Putin held talks in Beijing last week.

title: Bank of Canada Says Markets More Vulnerable to Sharp Correction
title_cn: 加拿大央行表示市场更容易受到急剧调整的影响
summary: The Bank of Canada said the financial system has functioned well through recent global shocks, but highlighted the risk of an asset price correction as well as vulnerabilities related to the role hedge funds are playing in debt markets.

title: Oil Tankers Suffer Drone Attacks Off Turkey’s Black Sea Coast
title_cn: 土耳其黑海沿岸油轮遭受无人机袭击
summary: Three crude-oil tankers sanctioned for being part of Russia’s shadow fleet were attacked by drones off Turkey’s Black Sea coast overnight, according to a local port agent.

title: EU Girds for Talks With Anthropic on Access to Mythos AI Model
title_cn: EU Girds 与 Anthropic 就 Mythos AI 模型的访问进行谈判
summary: European Commission officials are planning to meet with Anthropic PBC to seek more information on the company’s Mythos model and request making the groundbreaking artificial intelligence tool available to the bloc, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Apple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, AI Features
title_cn: 苹果将​​全面修改 iOS 27 Siri、AI 功能
summary: Apple is set to release a pretty significant redesign to Siri in its iOS 27 that includes AI features. Mark Gurman explains  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fails to Ease AI Fear
title_cn: Salesforce 给出的前景不温不火，未能缓解对人工智能的恐惧
summary: Salesforce Inc. gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates, failing to ease the concerns of investors already worried about the possibility that artificial intelligence will disrupt the software business.

title: Travel Stocks Jump on Cease-Fire Talk
title_cn: 旅游股因停火谈判而上涨
summary: Breaking Iran cease-fire headlines sent travel stocks soaring as oil prices dropped sharply. Kayak CEO Peer Bueller joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why travelers are still booking trips despite geopolitical chaos, rising airfare, and inflation, and why AI is changing how consumers search for deals. Plus, the hidden link between Middle East tensions and airline profits. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Is Overhauling Siri to Bring AI to the Masses
title_cn: 苹果正在彻底改革 Siri，将人工智能带给大众
summary: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says consumers "should be pumped" about the massive changes Apple is making to Siri. It's part of their effort to bring artificial intelligence to the masses. The updates are expected to be announced at the  June 8 Worldwide Developers Conference. He reports on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Space Startup Raises Funds for Laser Satellite Links
title_cn: 太空初创公司为激光卫星链路筹集资金
summary: Observable Space raised $90 million in its debut funding round as the company seeks to use lasers to help satellites and potentially orbiting data centers move information to and from Earth.

title: Musalem Says Fed Can't Rely on Possible Productivity Boom From AI
title_cn: 穆萨莱姆表示美联储不能依赖人工智能可能带来的生产力繁荣
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem says policymakers cannot depend on a potential productivity boom from AI to ease elevated inflation at a conference in Reykjavík, Iceland. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia CEO Hosts Dinner for Partners in Taiwan
title_cn: Nvidia 首席执行官为台湾合作伙伴举办晚宴
summary: Jensen Huang, chief executive officer of Nvidia Corp., signs autographs as he arrives for a dinner event in Taipei, Taiwan. The event, dubbed "The Trillion Dollar Banquet," is a regular dinner hosted by Huang when he visits his Taiwanese partners. Huang has been in the country this week attending multiple events.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Market Currencies Jump on Report of US-Iran Pact
title_cn: 美伊协议报告推动新兴市场货币上涨
summary: Emerging-market currencies jumped on a report that Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war.

title: Private Credit Snubs $2.5 Billion Deal by Thoma Bravo’s Sophos
title_cn: 私人信贷拒绝了 Thoma Bravo 的 Sophos 的 25 亿美元交易
summary: Just last year, private credit firms were falling over themselves to lend to software borrowers like Sophos. Now, AI anxiety has snarled up the market so much that Thoma Bravo’s $2.5 billion refinancing for the cybersecurity firm is facing hesitant lenders.

title: Caesars Entertainment Agrees to Buyout; Snowflake Soars on Outlook | Stock Movers
title_cn: 凯撒娱乐同意收购； Outlook 上的雪花飞扬 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with John Tucker:

- Apple (APPL) is moving on news the next iPhone, iPad and Mac software updates will feature a revamped Siri interface and a new chatbot-style app. The new Siri will include features such as the ability to understand personal data and analyze on-screen content, a rebuilt model using Google Gemini technology, and AI-powered web search.
- Caesars Entertainment (CZR) shares are on the move as the company agreed to be bought by Fertitta Entertainment Inc. in a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal. Caesars shareholders will get $31 a share in cash, which represents a 49% premium over Caesars’ stock price on Feb. 25.
- Snowflake (SNOW) is soaring after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud services and chips. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Waymo to Deploy Robotaxi Built With Zeekr to Expand Public Rides
title_cn: Waymo 将部署由 Zeekr 打造的 Robotaxi 以扩大公共乘车范围
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo unit will deploy a new autonomous vehicle designed specifically for robotaxi use, offering public rides in California and Arizona without human supervision.

title: Tilman Fertitta’s Years-Long Pursuit of Caesars Is Paying Off
title_cn: 蒂尔曼·费尔蒂塔 (Tilman Fertitta) 多年来对凯撒的追求正在得到回报
summary: Real estate mogul Tilman Fertitta’s years-long quest to buy Caesars Entertainment Inc. is finally paying off: His firm struck a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal for the Las Vegas company on Thursday that will add some 52 casinos in the US to his entertainment empire.

title: Snowflake CEO Weighs In on Sales Outlook, Signing $6 Billion Deal With Amazon
title_cn: Snowflake 首席执行官谈销售前景，与亚马逊签署 60 亿美元协议
summary: Snowflake Inc. shares jumped after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon’s cloud services and chips. Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy speaks to Bloomberg's Matt Miller and Caroline Hyde about the results and how it will work with Amazon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman's Wheeler Sees 'Generational Opportunity' in AI
title_cn: 高盛的惠勒看到了人工智能的“世代机会”
summary: Miriam Wheeler, Goldman Sachs global head of leverage finance, says investors are focused on hard assets associated with the infrastructure buildout of artificial intelligence and this is a "generational opportunity." Wheeler says power demand for data centers will double over the next few years. She speaks to Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The DOJ Wants to Know Who on Reddit and X Is Criticizing ICE's Tactics
title_cn: DOJ 想知道 Reddit 和 X 上谁批评 ICE 的策略
summary: In seeking identities of those behind anonymous social media posts, the Trump administration is intensifying its pursuit using grand jury subpoenas.

title: Snowflake Jumps Most Since 2020 on Sales Outlook, Amazon Deal
title_cn: 亚马逊交易中 Snowflake 的销售前景自 2020 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Snowflake Inc. shares surged by the most in more than five years after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud services and chips.

title: AI Is a ‘Capacity Creator’ for BNY, CEO Vince Says
title_cn: 首席执行官文斯表示，人工智能是纽约银行的“能力创造者”
summary: Robin Vince, CEO at BNY, describes himself as an “AI optimist” as he explains how the technology fits into the firm’s plans over the next five years. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: France Braces for Peak Heat as Power Demand Rises
title_cn: 随着电力需求的增加，法国准备迎接高温高峰
summary: The deadly heat wave gripping northwest Europe is set to intensify in Spain and France, lifting power demand for cooling and threatening fresh temperature records.

title: European Banks Could Cut 20% of Jobs on AI, Morgan Stanley Says
title_cn: 摩根士丹利表示，欧洲银行可能会削减 20% 的人工智能岗位
summary: The rapid spread of artificial intelligence may enable European banks to reduce their headcount by as much as a fifth over the “shorter term,” according to Morgan Stanley analysts.

title: Germany, Spain Push Back on European Plan to Ban Huawei Gear
title_cn: 德国、西班牙抵制欧洲禁止华为设备的计划
summary: Germany and Spain are leading opposition to European Commission plans to ban Chinese technology suppliers from telecom networks as part of new cybersecurity rules, according to people familiar with the negotiations.

title: Apple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, AI Features: Here's a First Peek
title_cn: 苹果将​​全面改革 iOS 27 Siri、AI 功能：这是第一眼
summary: The iPhone maker looks to stage a comeback in digital assistants and artificial intelligence.

title: Oura Ring 5 Is 40% Smaller, Detects Blood Pressure Changes and Sleep Disturbances
title_cn: Oura Ring 5 体积缩小 40%，可检测血压变化和睡眠障碍
summary: Oura Health Oy, the popular smart ring maker seeking to go public this year, unveiled a significantly thinner and lighter new model along with new wellness features.

title: Architect Set to Launch US-Listed Compute Futures in Challenge to CME, NYSE-owner
title_cn: 架构师将推出在美国上市的计算期货，挑战纽约证券交易所所有者 CME
summary: Architect Financial Technologies, an offshore derivatives exchange operator, has bought a US-regulated trading venue as it seeks to launch a futures market in computing power and other artificial intelligence commodities.

title: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Talent
title_cn: 波士顿利用加州亿万富翁税吸引人工智能人才
summary: The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley. Massachusetts business and political leaders say California’s proposed tax on billionaires is an opportunity to change that.

title: Snowflake Had Seminal Quarter for Software, Dan Ives Says
title_cn: 丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 表示，Snowflake 在软件领域具有开创性的意义
summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, examines second-quarter earnings from Snowflake and the pressure he sees on Salesforce to monetize 15% to 20% of their customer base over the next “two, three, four quarters.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta Eyes AI Subscriptions While AI Rivals Target Meta’s Ad Business
title_cn: Meta 着眼于 AI 订阅，而 AI 竞争对手则瞄准 Meta 的广告业务
summary: The social giant wants to make money from its chatbot, but its core business may be at risk.

title: Universal’s First Kid-Focused Theme Park to Open in Texas on July 1
title_cn: 环球影城首个以儿童为中心的主题公园将于 7 月 1 日在德克萨斯州开业
summary: Comcast Corp.’s Universal division will open its first theme park aimed specifically at young children this summer in an effort to reach a demographic that may be overwhelmed by some of the attractions at its bigger parks.

title: Temu Fined €200 Million by EU Over Dangerous Toys, Chargers
title_cn: Temu 因危险玩具、充电器被欧盟罚款 2 亿欧元
summary: Temu, the Chinese e-commerce giant, was fined €200 million ($232 million) by the European Union for failing to stop sales of unsafe baby toys and chargers on the platform.

title: The AI Boom Is Warping the San Francisco Property Market
title_cn: 人工智能热潮正在改变旧金山房地产市场
summary: Ordinary renters are getting squeezed out.

title: US, Iran Agree on Further Truce Pending Signoff, Source Says
title_cn: 消息人士称，美国和伊朗就进一步休战达成一致，等待签署
summary: Iran and the US have reached a tentative deal to extend a ceasefire and work toward an agreement to end the war, a US source familiar with the matter said, raising hopes the three-month conflict could be nearing a resolution.

title: Mullin Defends Migrant Jail Where Senator Was Pepper-Sprayed
title_cn: 穆林为参议员被胡椒喷雾的移民监狱辩护
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin defended conditions at a migrant detention center in New Jersey that was the scene of weekend protests in which two people were arrested and US Senator Andy Kim was hit with a cloud of pepper spray.

title: Former Businessman Becomes Latvian Premier After Drone Spat
title_cn: 无人机口角后前商人成为拉脱维亚总理
summary: Latvian Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs’s new government won a vote of confidence in parliament on Thursday following the collapse of the previous coalition in a row over drone incursions.

title: Wall Street Rushes to Mimic Crypto's Playbook on Capitol Hill
title_cn: 华尔街纷纷效仿国会山的加密货币剧本
summary: Banks are crafting a political spending strategy that resembles a structure the crypto industry has used.

title: Kenya, US Are in Ebola Complex Talks After Quarantine Report
title_cn: 检疫报告后肯尼亚和美国正在就埃博拉疫情进行谈判
summary: Kenya is in talks with the US on Ebola-related health cooperation after media reports that the Trump administration is planning to send Americans exposed to the virus to a quarantine facility in the East African nation being built by the US military.

title: Trump Files Fresh $10 Billion Suit Over WSJ’s Epstein Story
title_cn: 特朗普因《华尔街日报》报道爱泼斯坦的故事提起新的 100 亿美元诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump filed a new version of his $10 billion libel lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal and its parent company News Corp. over an article about his alleged close ties to Jeffrey Epstein, after an earlier version of the suit was tossed out by a judge.

title: NYC’s Mamdani Mimics Trump and Musk DOGE With COGE Plan
title_cn: 纽约市的 Mamdani 模仿特朗普和马斯克 DOGE 的 COGE 计划
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he’s forming a new Commission of Government Efficiency, or COGE, to improve the way City Hall spends public funds.

title: Ethiopia Says Bondholders Reject Latest Proposal of 12% Haircut
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚称债券持有人拒绝最新削减 12% 的提议
summary: Ethiopia’s finance ministry said restructuring talks with some bondholders fell through after they rebuffed its latest proposal for them to take a 12% loss, drawing out a default that dates back to December 2023.

title: Merz Aims to Halt Party Unrest With Vow to Revive Germany
title_cn: 梅尔茨致力于制止党派骚乱，誓言复兴德国
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz brushed aside talk that his plummeting popularity could prompt a bid to replace him as head Germany’s government as he vowed to press ahead with a reform agenda.

title: Swiss Police Say Train Station Attack Was a ‘Terrorist’ Incident
title_cn: 瑞士警方称火车站袭击是一起“恐怖”事件
summary: Three people were injured in a knife attack in the Swiss city of Winterthur on Thursday in what authorities have deemed a “terrorist” act.

title: Siddaramaiah Resigns as Chief Minister of Karnataka in India
title_cn: 西达拉玛辞去印度卡纳塔克邦首席部长职务
summary: Siddaramaiah has resigned from his position as the chief minister of the southern Indian state of Karnataka, one of the few states governed by the country’s opposition parties.

title: California ‘Class Traitor’ Tom Steyer Wants to Tax His Fellow Billionaires
title_cn: 加州“阶级叛徒”汤姆·斯泰尔想要向他的亿万富翁同胞征税
summary: The former hedge fund titan is waging one of the most expensive gubernatorial campaigns in US history — on a platform the business community hates.

title: Sweden to Sell, Donate Saab Jets to Ukraine to Aid Defense
title_cn: 瑞典将向乌克兰出售、捐赠萨博喷气式飞机以援助国防
summary: Sweden said it will sell 20 of the latest model Saab Gripen fighter jets to Ukraine and donate 16 older versions of the aircraft to support Kyiv’s fight against the Russian invasion.

title: Singapore’s Top Envoy Meets Kim Jong Un’s Close Aide on Rare Trip
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问金正恩亲密助手
summary: Singapore’s foreign minister held talks with a top aide to North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare visit to Pyongyang, urging the isolated state to keep channels for dialogue open with the outside world.

title: Talarico Gets $3 Million in One Day as Texas to Become Money Pit
title_cn: 德克萨斯州沦为金钱坑，塔拉里科一日赚 300 万美元
summary: As Donald Trump celebrated Ken Paxton’s landslide win in Texas, Republican officials were busy gearing up for a brutal fight that may end up costing them more than $100 million to stop a Democrat from flipping a seat in a state the president won by 14 percentage points.

title: Hungary Is ‘Very Close’ to EU Funding Deal, Premier Magyar Says
title_cn: 匈牙利总理马扎尔表示，匈牙利“非常接近”达成欧盟资助协议
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said his government is “very close” to a deal with the European Union that would open the way for the release of billions of euros in suspended aid and ease the pressure on the cash-strapped budget.

title: Russia and Kazakhstan Sign Energy, FX Swap Deals as Putin Visits
title_cn: 普京访问期间俄罗斯和哈萨克斯坦签署能源、外汇互换协议
summary: Russia and Kazakhstan signed a series of deals during a visit by President Vladimir Putin, including a currency swap arrangement and an agreement on financing for the construction of the Central Asian nation’s first nuclear power plant.

title: Trump Grapples With Supreme Court as Major Cases Loom
title_cn: 随着重大案件的临近，特朗普与最高法院展开斗争
summary: Outstanding decisions are set to track the limits of the president’s power

title: US Strikes Iran Targets, Oil Gains With No Accord in Sight
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗目标，石油价格上涨但看不到任何协议
summary: Renewed US attacks on Iran targets near the Strait of Hormuz threaten a fragile ceasefire. Oil climbed as traders wait for signs of whether the US and Iran can reach a peace deal that would reopen the critical waterway. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos and Takaichi Agree on Talks Toward Military Info Sharing
title_cn: 马科斯和高市就军事信息共享谈判达成一致
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi agreed to start talks toward a deal that would facilitate military information-sharing, as shared concerns over an increasingly assertive China accelerate a deepening of security ties between the two Asian nations.

title: Norway Joins Macron’s Push to Shield Europe With French Nukes
title_cn: 挪威加入马克龙的行列，利用法国核武器保护欧洲
summary: Norway became the ninth country to join French President Emmanuel Macron’s initiative to spread France’s nuclear deterrence across more of Europe.

title: Hezbollah Turns the Tables as Iran Talks Creak
title_cn: 伊朗谈判破裂，真主党扭转局势
summary: Israel, having largely focused its offensive on southern Lebanon, is again sending warplanes inland.

title: Philippine Senator Charged Over ‘Illicit Payouts’ in Flood Mess
title_cn: 菲律宾参议员被控在洪水混乱中“非法支付”
summary: The Philippines’ anti-graft watchdog charged Senator Jinggoy Estrada with plunder and graft for allegedly receiving millions of pesos in an infrastructure corruption scheme that slowed economic growth and outraged the public.

title: India, China Pursue Border Cooperation Talks Amid Thaw in Ties
title_cn: 印度和中国在关系解冻之际寻求边境合作谈判
summary: China and India discussed marking out the disputed border and trans-border rivers, key sticking points in ties, in the latest sign that the neighbors are continuing their efforts to stabilize relations.

title: Meloni Pushes Italian Electoral Reform Ahead of 2027 Election
title_cn: 梅洛尼在 2027 年大选前推动意大利选举改革
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni’s government submitted a proposal to reform Italy’s electoral law in a bid to improve the premier’s chances in the 2027 general election.

title: Russia Plans to Launch Crewed Spacecraft From Baikonur in July
title_cn: 俄罗斯计划七月从拜科努尔发射载人航天器
summary: Russia plans its first launch of a manned space mission from the Baikonur launch site this year with a crew that includes a NASA astronaut.

title: South African Legislature Seeks Legal Advice on Ramaphosa Probe
title_cn: 南非立法机构就拉马福萨调查寻求法律建议
summary: South Africa’s parliamentary speaker is seeking legal advice on whether the legislature should proceed with an impeachment inquiry into President Cyril Ramaphosa over his handling of a robbery at his game farm, after he filed a lawsuit seeking to halt the process.
